allow: Bash(py .claude/skills/ai-multimodal/scripts/gemini_batch_process.py --task generate --prompt "A premium aquarium product hero shot. A sleek rectangular glass aquarium tank filled with crystal-clear water, lush vibrant green aquatic plants \(java fern, anubias, carpet plants\), colorful tropical fish \(neon tetras, discus fish\) swimming gracefully inside. Dramatic studio lighting with soft rim light highlighting the glass edges and water surface. Deep black background with subtle dark navy gradient. Professional commercial product photography, high-end luxury aesthetic, sharp focus, ultra-realistic, photorealistic render." --output apps/web-client/src/assets/generated/aquarium-hero --model gemini-2.5-flash-image --aspect-ratio 16:9)
